families.taskClass: bounded elementwise and coordinate transforms over typed storage buffers

resourceLayouts: source and result are tightly packed runtime-sized arrays of f32 with byteLength bytes each.
operation: For every index below elementCount, write result[index] = source[index] * 1.5 - 0.25. Guard all tail invocations.
passGraph: Run one compute pass with a WORKGROUP_SIZE override and x = ceil_div(elementCount, WORKGROUP_SIZE); output result.

families.taskClass: two-dimensional tiled matrix transforms with boundary tiles

resourceLayouts: source and result are row-major packed f32 matrices with byteLength bytes. matrix-config is exactly 16 bytes: width:u32, height:u32, reserved_0:u32, reserved_1:u32.
operation: Transpose the matrix so result[x * height + y] = source[y * width + x]. Stage values through workgroup memory, synchronize before reading, and guard boundary tiles.
passGraph: Run one two-dimensional compute pass using WORKGROUP_SIZE for x and y; dispatch ceil_div(width, WORKGROUP_SIZE) by ceil_div(height, WORKGROUP_SIZE); output result.

families.taskClass: neighborhood image filters over sampled and storage textures

resourceLayouts: source-texture is an rgba8unorm sampled 2D texture, source-sampler is a nearest clamp-to-edge filtering sampler, and result-texture is an rgba8unorm write-only storage texture; both textures are width by height.
operation: Copy each source texel exactly to the matching result coordinate. Exercise both textureLoad and explicit-level nearest sampling without changing the copied value, and guard coordinates outside width and height.
passGraph: Run one two-dimensional compute pass with WORKGROUP_SIZE and ceil-divided width and height; output result-texture.

families.taskClass: contention-safe histograms and counters with deterministic totals

resourceLayouts: samples is a packed runtime-sized array of u32 with inputBytes bytes. histogram is a four-element array of atomic<u32> with outputBytes bytes.
operation: Count every sample into bin samples[index] % 4. Initialize four workgroup-local atomic bins, synchronize, accumulate valid samples, synchronize again, and atomically merge all four bins into histogram.
passGraph: Run one compute pass with WORKGROUP_SIZE at least four and x = ceil_div(elementCount, WORKGROUP_SIZE); output histogram.

families.taskClass: procedural vertex geometry with fragment-coordinate shading

resourceLayouts: scene is exactly 16 bytes containing tint:vec4<f32>. color is an rgba8unorm render target sized width by height.
operation: Generate a viewport-covering triangle from vertex_index with clip positions (-1,-1), (3,-1), and (-1,3). Shade every covered fragment with scene.tint.
passGraph: Run one direct render pass drawing three vertices and one instance to color; output color.

families.taskClass: indexed meshes using explicit vertex layouts and interpolated attributes

resourceLayouts: vertices uses arrayStride 24 with position float32x2 at offset 0 and color float32x4 at offset 8. indices is uint32. transform is exactly 16 bytes: scale:vec2<f32>, offset:vec2<f32>. color is an rgba8unorm target.
operation: Transform each position as position * scale + offset, pass the vertex color to the fragment stage, and return the interpolated color unchanged.
passGraph: Run one indexed render pass using indexCount, one instance, vertices slot 0, and indices; output color.

families.taskClass: sampled-texture sprites with coordinate transforms and filtering contracts

resourceLayouts: sprite-texture is a 2x2 rgba8unorm sampled texture, sprite-sampler is nearest clamp-to-edge, sprite-config is exactly 16 bytes containing tint:vec4<f32>, and color is an rgba8unorm target.
operation: Generate a viewport-covering triangle, map clip position to texture UV with a vertical flip, sample the sprite, and multiply by tint. Exercise fragment derivatives without changing the color.
passGraph: Run one direct render pass drawing three vertices and one instance; output color.

families.taskClass: compute-generated geometry or attributes consumed by a render pass

resourceLayouts: positions is exactly 24 bytes for three vec2<f32> values. draw-config is exactly 16 bytes containing color:vec4<f32>. color is an rgba8unorm target.
operation: The compute pass writes clip positions (-1,-1), (3,-1), and (-1,3) into positions. The render pass reads those positions by vertex_index and shades all fragments with draw-config.color.
passGraph: Run the compute pass first, then a direct three-vertex render pass consuming the same positions buffer; output color.

families.taskClass: multi-workgroup reductions with partial final groups

resourceLayouts: source is a packed runtime-sized f32 array with inputBytes bytes. partials is a packed f32 array with outputBytes bytes. reduce-config is exactly 16 bytes: element_count:u32, group_count:u32, reserved_0:u32, reserved_1:u32.
operation: Each workgroup sums its consecutive WORKGROUP_SIZE source elements into one partial. Treat indices at or beyond element_count as zero and perform a synchronized tree reduction in workgroup memory.
passGraph: Run one compute pass with x = ceil_div(elementCount, WORKGROUP_SIZE); output partials.

families.taskClass: two-dimensional cellular updates with explicit boundary semantics

resourceLayouts: current-state is an rgba8unorm sampled texture, next-state is an rgba8unorm write-only storage texture, and grid-config is exactly 16 bytes: width:u32, height:u32, reserved_0:u32, reserved_1:u32.
operation: For every in-range coordinate, load current-state and write next-state with red = 1 - red while preserving green, blue, and alpha.
passGraph: Run one bounded two-dimensional compute pass using WORKGROUP_SIZE and ceil-divided width and height; output next-state.

families.taskClass: instanced geometry with per-instance storage and uniform transforms

resourceLayouts: glyph-vertices has arrayStride 8 with position float32x2 at offset 0. instances is a runtime-sized array of vec2<f32> offsets. glyph-config is exactly 32 bytes: scale:vec2<f32>, reserved:vec2<f32>, color:vec4<f32>.
operation: For each instance, transform each glyph vertex as position * scale + instance_offsets[instance_index]. Shade every fragment with glyph-config.color.
passGraph: Run one direct instanced render pass with vertexCount and instanceCount using glyph-vertices slot 0; output color.

families.taskClass: offscreen render followed by sampled-texture postprocessing

resourceLayouts: scene is exactly 16 bytes containing color:vec4<f32>. offscreen is a width-by-height rgba8unorm render target readable by the next pass, postprocess-sampler is nearest clamp-to-edge, and color is the final rgba8unorm target.
operation: The first full-screen pass writes scene.color to offscreen. The second full-screen pass maps clip position to vertically flipped UV and samples offscreen unchanged into color.
passGraph: Run offscreen-pass before postprocess-pass; each draws a viewport-covering triangle; output color.

families.taskClass: parameterized separable and normalized convolutions with edge handling

resourceLayouts: source-image is a width-by-height rgba8unorm sampled texture, image-sampler is nearest clamp-to-edge, filtered-image is an rgba8unorm write-only storage texture, and filter-config is exactly 16 bytes: width:u32, height:u32, reserved_0:u32, reserved_1:u32.
operation: At each in-range coordinate, apply the horizontal normalized kernel [1,2,1] / 4 using explicit-level sampling at center-step, center, and center+step. Also exercise textureLoad without changing the result.
passGraph: Run one bounded two-dimensional compute pass using WORKGROUP_SIZE and ceil-divided width and height; output filtered-image.

families.taskClass: stateful particle integration with bounded domains and deterministic forces

resourceLayouts: particles and next-particles are packed runtime-sized arrays of Particle { position:vec2<f32>, velocity:vec2<f32> }, 16 bytes per particle. integration-config is exactly 16 bytes: delta_time:f32, domain_max:f32, count:u32, reserved:u32.
operation: For each index below integration-config.count, write position = clamp(position + velocity * delta_time, vec2(0), vec2(domain_max)) and copy velocity unchanged.
passGraph: Run one compute pass with x = ceil_div(particleCount, WORKGROUP_SIZE), guarding by config count; output next-particles.

families.taskClass: indexed transformed meshes with sampled material data

resourceLayouts: mesh-vertices has arrayStride 16 with position float32x2 at offset 0 and uv float32x2 at offset 8. mesh-indices is uint32. mesh-transform is exactly 16 bytes: scale:vec2<f32>, offset:vec2<f32>. material-texture is 2x2 rgba8unorm with a nearest clamp-to-edge sampler.
operation: Transform positions as position * scale + offset, pass UV unchanged, and shade fragments by sampling material-texture at the interpolated UV.
passGraph: Run one indexed render pass using indexCount, mesh-vertices slot 0, and mesh-indices; output color.

families.taskClass: compute simulation state rendered through a separate visualization pass

resourceLayouts: simulation-state is exactly 24 bytes for three vec2<f32> clip positions. visual-config is exactly 16 bytes containing color:vec4<f32>. color is an rgba8unorm target.
operation: The compute pass writes clip positions (-1,-1), (3,-1), and (-1,3). The render pass reads them by vertex_index for each instance and shades with visual-config.color; instance_index must not change the position.
passGraph: Run compute before an instanced direct render of three vertices and instanceCount instances; output color.

families.taskClass: segmented reductions with irregular boundaries and neutral elements

resourceLayouts: source is a packed runtime-sized f32 array with inputBytes bytes. partials stores one f32 per segment with outputBytes bytes. reduce-config is exactly 16 bytes: element_count:u32, segment_count:u32, reserved_0:u32, reserved_1:u32.
operation: For segment s, sum every source[index] where index % segment_count == s. Each workgroup owns one segment, strides by WORKGROUP_SIZE, and combines lane sums with a synchronized workgroup reduction.
passGraph: Run one compute pass with x = segmentCount workgroups and WORKGROUP_SIZE lanes; output partials.

families.taskClass: coordinate image warps with explicit sampling and out-of-range policy

resourceLayouts: source-image is a width-by-height rgba8unorm sampled texture, warp-sampler is nearest clamp-to-edge, warped-image is an rgba8unorm write-only storage texture, and warp-config is exactly 16 bytes: width:u32, height:u32, reserved_0:u32, reserved_1:u32.
operation: Mirror horizontally: destination (x,y) samples source (width - 1 - x,y) at the source texel center. Guard all out-of-range destination invocations.
passGraph: Run one bounded two-dimensional compute pass using WORKGROUP_SIZE and ceil-divided width and height; output warped-image.

families.taskClass: indexed mesh shading with transformed normals and directional lighting

resourceLayouts: shaded-vertices has arrayStride 20 with position float32x2 at offset 0 and normal float32x3 at offset 8. shaded-indices is uint32. lighting is exactly 32 bytes: light_direction:vec3<f32>, reserved:f32, base_color:vec4<f32>.
operation: Pass clip-space position and normal through the vertex stage. In the fragment stage compute intensity = max(dot(normalize(normal), normalize(light_direction)), 0) and return base_color.rgb * intensity with base_color.a.
passGraph: Run one indexed render pass using indexCount, shaded-vertices slot 0, and shaded-indices; output color.

families.taskClass: alternating state textures followed by a visualization pass

resourceLayouts: state-a is a width-by-height rgba8unorm sampled texture, state-b is a matching rgba8unorm storage texture that is sampled by the next pass, state-sampler is nearest clamp-to-edge, and color is the final rgba8unorm target.
operation: The compute pass copies every in-range texel from state-a to state-b exactly. The visualization pass maps a viewport-covering triangle to vertically flipped UV and samples state-b unchanged.
passGraph: Run the bounded compute pass before the full-screen render pass; output color.
